summary: Agent was tasked with adding a `retryWithBackoff` utility function to `src/utils/shell-test-runner.ts` with exponential backoff retry logic (max 3 attempts, 500ms base delay, 2x multiplier) and corresponding tests. The agent began investigation by running existing tests (which passed) and attempting to read the target file, but encountered a file-not-found error despite the file appearing in directory listings, suggesting a potential filesystem or path resolution issue. The session appears incomplete as the LLM response was cut off mid-execution.
